creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
Daniel Stenberg, the author of the cURL tool, has adopted and branched
the ares asynchronous DNS resolver library under a new name, c-ares.
As the maintainer of the current ftp/curl and dns/ares ports, I think that
c-ares would deserve its own port in its own name :)

So - this is a request for a repo-copy of the ports/dns/ares/ directory to
ports/dns/c-ares/

Thanks in advance!

Fix: 

Repo-copy ports/dns/ares/ to ports/dns/c-ares/ :)
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
